description_long: This kiosk is a compact, two-level structure with a prominent overhanging roof and a raised platform accessible by a short staircase. The main body is rectangular, with a wooden deck extending around the front and sides, and a partial railing enclosing the upper level. The roof is wide and slightly curved, providing ample shade and shelter, while the lower level is enclosed and solid. The kiosk sits on a square wooden base, suggesting it is designed for placement in open urban spaces such as parks or plazas. The materials appear to be a combination of wood for the deck and base, and light-colored panels or plaster for the main structure, with metal or painted wood railings. There are no visible windows or signage, and the entryway is open at the front, inviting interaction from passersby.
description: A two-level kiosk with a wide overhanging roof, raised wooden platform, front staircase, and partial railing, designed for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid back wall and the overhanging roof with no visible entry or windows.
description_view_1: Front view featuring the staircase, open entryway, partial railing, and the main access point to the kiosk.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the overhanging roof and the side of the raised platform with the railing visible.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the enclosed lower level and the side of the staircase, with the railing visible through the structure.
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: Wide, slightly curved flat roof with significant overhangs, likely made of light panels or metal, no skylights or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with functional urban influences
